overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character in a white lab coat walking through a futuristic industrial facility. The character moves from a medical laboratory through connecting corridors toward a mess hall, passing security guards and high-tech equipment in a metallic, utilitarian environment with artificial lighting.

events.description: character walks through the automatic sliding door into the medical facility

agents.ego_description: walking through the automatic doorway into the medical facility, moving past the entry keypad

notable_agents.action: security guard standing stationary near the entrance, facing away from the camera

entered.detail: large metallic sliding door frame with hydraulic mechanisms
illuminated keypad and card reader mounted on the wall
hospital gurney with yellow and red safety straps
tall white filing cabinets with multiple drawers
white desks with computers and medical equipment
recessed fluorescent light panels in the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with the character approaching and entering a futuristic medical facility through an automatic sliding door. The environment features metallic walls, a security keypad on the right, and medical equipment including a stretcher visible in the room ahead. A security guard stands near the entrance as the character moves into the narrow entry vestibule under artificial fluorescent lighting.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the laboratory space, passing medical equipment and office furniture

entered.detail: white curved desks with office chairs and computer terminals
second automatic door leading to the corridor, with warning stripes on the floor

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into the laboratory interior, passing the medical stretcher on the left and white storage cabinets. The room opens into a workspace with curved office desks on the right side. The character approaches the far end of the room where a second automatic door leads to the next area.

scene_state.functional_zone: security corridor leading to mess hall

events.description: passes through automatic door into the narrow corridor with yellow hazard markings
approaches the illuminated Mess Hall sign and circular doorway

agents.ego_description: walking through the corridor toward the Mess Hall entrance, following the directional signage

notable_agents.action: security guard walking ahead in the same direction toward the Mess Hall

entered.detail: sliding door connecting the laboratory to the corridor
yellow and black diagonal hazard stripes on the floor
tall metal shelving units with supplies
illuminated orange sign reading MESS HALL with directional arrows
large circular doorway with glass panels leading to the Mess Hall
trees and natural light visible through the far doorway

segments.scene_description: The character transitions into a narrow security corridor marked with yellow hazard stripes on the floor. Metal shelving lines the right wall while a security guard walks ahead toward the destination. The corridor leads to a large circular doorway marked by an illuminated MESS HALL sign overhead, with greenery visible through the glass panels suggesting an outdoor area beyond.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sterile entrance of a medical facility through a series of industrial corridors toward a bright mess hall. It begins as the character passes a security guard and enters through automatic sliding doors into a narrow vestibule defined by metallic walls and fluorescent lighting. As the camera moves deeper into the laboratory, the space opens up to reveal medical stretchers and curved office desks before approaching a second set of automatic doors. The scene then shifts into a narrow security corridor marked by yellow hazard stripes and metal shelving, following a guard who walks ahead. Finally, the path leads through a large circular doorway beneath an illuminated mess hall sign, where glass panels reveal glimpses of greenery beyond the facility.
